content:
✅ Why This Works:
• Creates a full range of in-class dynamics, from completely passive to fully authoritarian.
• Gives students the chance to engage in different learning environments.
• Ties literary concepts to teaching styles in a meta way.

📜 3. Weekly Challenges – XP Sacrifice, Group Skill Checks, & Unlockable Risks

📜 Each week now has a structured challenge with pros/cons.

✔ Archetype Challenge: An entire class of students must band together to complete a challenge and gain a collective perk.
✔ Party Challenge: A small group must attempt a skill check together for an in-class unlock.
✔ Lone Wolf Challenge: A single student can attempt a high-risk skill check to unlock something, but it requires sacrificing XP.

Example: Week 6 – Modernism & Breaking Traditional Form
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 155 (chunk 155/555)
